title: ruta pilosa
intro: Ruta pilosa, also known as rue or common rue, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use as a carminative and anti-inflammatory agent. Ruta pilosa has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including menstrual cramps, joint pain, and skin conditions such as acne and eczema, due to its antiseptic and antispasmodic properties. In herbal preparations, ruta pilosa is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and its essential oil is used in aromatherapy and skincare products.
